title: UN chief calls for immediate reopening of Strait of Hormuz — warns of global food emergency
snippet: UN Secretary-General António Guterres addressed the Security Council calling for urgent and unimpeded reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. Warned the continued closure is inflicting severe humanitarian toll — if passage remains blocked, millions in Africa and South Asia risk being pushed into hunger and poverty. Dozens of countries joined the call. 20% of global LNG and oil transit has been disrupted since February.
tag_reason: 구테흐스의 호르무즈 즉시 개방 촉구는 신규 사건. 이전 소스에 없음.
